title: Allegations & Claims
subtitle: Management of technical student claims, question annulment, and grade recalculation.
modalDesc: Decide the corrective action for this question. This will retroactively update all exams containing it.
optionShiftDesc: Change the correct option to another valid option index.
optionCancelDesc: Exclude this question from the total scoring (exam evaluated over N-1 questions).
optionGivePointsDesc: Mark this question as correct for all students regardless of response.
reasonPlaceholder: Explain the technical rationale for why this question is incorrect, has multiple correct options, or has typos...
toastResolveSuccess: Claim resolved and scores recalculated successfully.
noAllegations: NO ALLEGATIONS DETECTED UNDER THESE PARAMETERS
feedbackPlaceholder: Provide the technical justification for this resolution...
